license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xr5fm86
title: U Mass - Aspartate Transferase
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: Perform daily quality control assessment of instrumentation before analysis.
Load each sample into a specialized micro-sample cup for the clinical chemistry analyzer.
Select Aspartate Transferase test on display and run the analysis.
